name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-afc

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-afc
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Afc SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Afc SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-afc
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common afc
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.afc.v20200226.afc_client.AfcClient.QueryAntiFraudVip
documentation:
天御反欺诈服务，主要应用于银行、证券、保险、P2P等金融行业客户，通过腾讯的大数据风控能力，
可以准确识别恶意用户信息，解决客户在支付、活动、理财，风控等业务环节遇到的欺诈威胁，降低企业
的损失。

```
param request

Request instance for QueryAntiFraudVip.

type request



rtype

```
